summary: Verified backend moderation handling for generate-image and generate-video APIs. All targeted features working correctly: 1) Safe prompts return 200 with video_base64, 2) Provider moderation errors are detected and converted to 422 with user-friendly messages, 3) Moderation messages contain guidance about safety checks and rephrasing. The is_provider_moderation_error() function correctly detects moderation-related keywords (content moderation, rejected, policy, unsafe, safety, leak) and moderation_block_detail() returns appropriate guidance.
critical_code_review_comments: moderation_block_detail() returns user-friendly message: 'Your {media_type} prompt was blocked by provider safety checks. Please rephrase and avoid explicit, illegal, or sensitive-leak style requests.'
422 status code properly used for moderation errors (not 400 or 500)
Moderation check in video endpoint covers both initial request failure AND polling status (400 during poll)
Backend logs show proper flow: request_id -> poll -> moderation detected -> 422 returned
context_for_next_testing_agent: Moderation handling verified working. When provider returns 'content moderation' in error, backend converts to 422 with message 'Your {type} prompt was blocked by provider safety checks. Please rephrase and avoid explicit, illegal, or sensitive-leak style requests.' Note: Provider moderation is not 100% consistent - some borderline prompts may pass through. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_moderation_handling.py covers validation and moderation scenarios.

features_verified.POST /api/generate-video safe prompt: PASS - Returns 200 with non-empty video_base64 (4.4MB video data)
features_verified.POST /api/generate-video moderated promp: PASS - Provider moderation returns fast 422 (not long poll timeout)

moderation_block_detail.format: Your {media_type} prompt was blocked by provider safety checks. Please rephrase and avoid explicit, illegal, or sensitive-leak style requests.
